sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31966" key="e)kzh/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκζήτ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n31966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">research,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
